news.t: This once popular ETF used to hedge against inflation is now out of favor. What investors are doing now.
IndexIQ Launches IQ CBRE Real Assets ETF (IQRA) Strengthening Its Ongoing Partnership With CBRE Investment Management

holdings.infoBox: IQRA is an equity ETF with a total of 106 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 6.52%, Equinix at 4.25%, Simon Property Group at 3.31%, Xcel Energy at 2.92%, and WEC Energy Group at 2.56%.

overview.description: The NYLI CBRE Real Assets ETF (IQRA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI World index. The fund is an actively managed equity strategy that invests globally in companies tied to real assets, such as infrastructure and real estate. The fund seeks total return through growth and income IQRA was launched on May 10, 2023 and is issued by New York Life Investments.

data.title: This once popular ETF used to hedge against inflation is now out of favor. What investors are doing now.
data.text: Hello! This is markets reporter Isabel Wang bringing you this week's ETF Wrap. In this week's edition, we take a look at inflation-protected bond ETFs.

data.title: IndexIQ Launches IQ CBRE Real Assets ETF (IQRA) Strengthening Its Ongoing Partnership With CBRE Investment Management
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IndexIQ launches IQ CBRE Real Assets ETF (IQRA), sub-advised by CBRE Investment Management, seeking to provide total return and current income.
